title: Brevo vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Constant Contact email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings and find the best fit for your business.
h1: Brevo vs Constant Contact: Complete Comparison
intro: Brevo and Constant Contact are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs and budgets. Brevo excels as an all-in-one CRM with a generous free tier, while Constant Contact focuses on simplicity for nonprofits and local businesses. This comparison will help you determine which platform is the better fit for your marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, transactional API
comparison_table.tool_b: Email, SMS, events, social ads, e-commerce, templates

choose_a_if: You want a free tier with high subscriber limits (up to 100,000)
You need multi-channel marketing including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat
You require a built-in CRM and transactional email API capabilities
choose_b_if: You prefer a straightforward, beginner-friendly interface
You need robust event management and social media advertising tools
You run an e-commerce business with integrated shopping features

faq.q: Is Brevo better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Brevo offers better value with its free tier and more comprehensive feature set including CRM and multiple communication channels. However, Constant Contact may be better for beginners who prefer simplicity and for e-commerce businesses needing integrated shopping features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper overall. It offers a free tier for up to 100,000 subscribers, while Constant Contact has no free option and starts at $12/month. Even Brevo's paid plans begin at $25/month but include more features than Constant Contact's entry-level offering.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports. You can export your contacts and campaigns from Constant Contact and import them into Brevo. Most migrations are straightforward, though you may need to reconfigure some automation rules depending on complexity.
